title: In Parliament | Paul Foster MP
meta_description: Official website of Paul Foster MP. Member of Parliament for the South Ribble constituency.
headings: h2: Letter: Pause of ASD and ADHD support for children and young people
text_excerpt: --> In Parliament | Paul Foster MP top of page Home About In Parliament Latest Contact Help and Support In Parliament Here, you can follow my work in the House of Commons and Parliament, where I tirelessly advocates for our community's interests and works on legislation that shapes our nation's future. From participating in debates and committees to presenting bills and raising important issues. Parliamentary Contributions Parliamentary News Letter: Pause of ASD and ADHD support for children and young people The decision by Lancashire and South Cumbria NHS Foundation Trust to pause new referrals and halt progress on existing waiting lists for autism (ASD) and ADHD assessments for children and young people is deeply concerning to me. I share this concern with other Lancashire-based MPs, so I have joined them in writing to the Trust to raise our concerns. Paul Foster National Heart Month February is 'Heart Month' - a time when we shine a light on cardiovascular disease and the everyday steps that can reduce risk, like healthy eating and exercise. Paul Foster Government’s new Troubles Bill As a veteran, I’ve met far too many people who have been personally affected by the previous Government’s unlawful Legacy Act - families who were effectively shut out of the search for truth and justice.
